title: VTOP — Pipeline flow (draw.io)
description: draw.io SVG pipeline driven live by the Flow panel.

panels.title: VTOP telemetry pipeline (draw.io / Flow)
panels.description: The telemetry path as a draw.io SVG driven live by the Flow panel: labels show messages/sec and bytes/sec in, compression and stage p95 in the engine, bytes/sec out, and commits / failed / lag. Connectors animate at a speed set by throughput. verify-before-commit is the centre. Rendered with the React Flow panel, which loads on Grafana 13 (the AngularJS flowcharting plugin does not).

targets.expr: histogram_quantile(0.5, sum by (le) (rate(vtop_compression_ratio_bucket[5m]))) and (sum(rate(vtop_compression_ratio_bucket[5m])) > 0) or vector(0)
histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by (le) (rate(vtop_stage_duration_seconds_bucket[5m]))) and (sum(rate(vtop_stage_duration_seconds_bucket[5m])) > 0) or vector(0)

options.svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" width="920" height="440" viewBox="0 0 920 440" font-family="Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif">
  <!-- VTOP telemetry pipeline, authored for the andrewbmchugh Flow panel.
       Driven cells use id="flow-*" and cellIdPreamble:"" in the panelConfig.
       Each driven number is a <text> the plugin overwrites with the live value;
       the static <text> captions beside them are plain SVG. Connectors carry a
       native dash-flow animation so the pipeline always reads as "flowing", and
       the panelConfig also wires flowAnimation so the plugin drives their speed. -->
  <defs>
    <marker id="arrow" markerWidth="10" markerHeight="10" refX="7" refY="3" orient="auto" markerUnits="strokeWidth">
      <path d="M0,0 L7,3 L0,6 Z" fill="#5b9bd5"/>
    </marker>
    <style>
      .cap   { fill:#9aa0a6; font-size:11px; }
      .title { font-size:14px; font-weight:bold; }
      .val   { font-size:18px; font-weight:bold; fill:#d8d9da; }
      .box   { fill:#1b1b1f; stroke:#ffffff30; stroke-width:1; rx:8; }
      .flow  { stroke:#5b9bd5; stroke-width:4; fill:none; stroke-dasharray:10 8;
               marker-end:url(#arrow); animation:dash 1s linear infinite; }
      @keyframes dash { to { stroke-dashoffset:-18; } }
    </style>
  </defs>

  <rect x="0" y="0" width="920" height="440" fill="#0f0f12"/>

  <!-- ================= SOURCES ================= -->
  <rect class="box" x="20" y="70" width="180" height="210"/>
  <text class="title" x="110" y="94" text-anchor="middle" fill="#8ab4f8">SOURCES</text>
  <text x="110" y="122" text-anchor="middle" fill="#e8e8e8" font-size="13">Kafka</text>
  <text x="110" y="144" text-anchor="middle" fill="#9aa0a6" font-size="12">Files · Syslog</text>
  <text class="cap" x="110" y="180" text-anchor="middle">messages / sec</text>
  <g id="flow-msgin"><text class="val" x="110" y="202" text-anchor="middle" fill="#8ab4f8">0</text></g>
  <text class="cap" x="110" y="234" text-anchor="middle">bytes / sec in</text>
  <g id="flow-bytesin"><text class="val" x="110" y="256" text-anchor="middle" fill="#8ab4f8">0</text></g>

  <!-- connector SOURCES -> ENGINE -->
  <g id="flow-conn-in"><path class="flow" d="M 205 175 L 320 175"/></g>

  <!-- ================= ENGINE ================= -->
  <rect class="box" x="325" y="50" width="270" height="230" stroke="#73bf6955"/>
  <text class="title" x="460" y="74" text-anchor="middle" fill="#73bf69">VTOP ENGINE</text>
  <text x="460" y="98" text-anchor="middle" fill="#c8c8c8" font-size="11">seal → compress → checksum → upload</text>
  <text x="460" y="118" text-anchor="middle" fill="#8a8f96" font-size="11">verify before commit</text>
  <text class="cap" x="395" y="158" text-anchor="middle">compression</text>
  <g id="flow-ratio"><text class="val" x="395" y="182" text-anchor="middle" fill="#73bf69">0</text></g>
  <text class="cap" x="525" y="158" text-anchor="middle">stage p95</text>
  <g id="flow-p95"><text class="val" x="525" y="182" text-anchor="middle" fill="#f2cc0c">0</text></g>
  <text class="cap" x="460" y="224" text-anchor="middle">records / sec archived</text>
  <g id="flow-recs"><text class="val" x="460" y="248" text-anchor="middle" fill="#73bf69">0</text></g>

  <!-- connector ENGINE -> MINIO -->
  <g id="flow-conn-out"><path class="flow" d="M 600 150 L 695 150" stroke="#f2a600"/></g>

  <!-- ================= OBJECT STORAGE ================= -->
  <rect class="box" x="700" y="70" width="200" height="170" stroke="#f2a60055"/>
  <text class="title" x="800" y="94" text-anchor="middle" fill="#f2a600">OBJECT STORAGE</text>
  <text x="800" y="118" text-anchor="middle" fill="#e8e8e8" font-size="13">MinIO / S3</text>
  <text class="cap" x="800" y="152" text-anchor="middle">bytes / sec out</text>
  <g id="flow-bytesout"><text class="val" x="800" y="176" text-anchor="middle" fill="#f2a600">0</text></g>
  <text class="cap" x="800" y="208" text-anchor="middle">object + manifest</text>

  <!-- connector ENGINE -> VERIFY (downward) -->
  <g id="flow-conn-verify"><path class="flow" d="M 460 282 L 460 315" stroke="#73bf69"/></g>

  <!-- ================= VERIFY / COMMIT ================= -->
  <rect id="flow-verifybox" class="box" x="325" y="318" width="270" height="100" stroke="#73bf6955"/>
  <text class="title" x="460" y="342" text-anchor="middle" fill="#73bf69">VERIFIED?  commit only if true</text>
  <text class="cap" x="395" y="372" text-anchor="middle">commits</text>
  <g id="flow-commits"><text class="val" x="395" y="398" text-anchor="middle" fill="#73bf69">0</text></g>
  <text class="cap" x="525" y="372" text-anchor="middle">failed</text>
  <g id="flow-failed"><text class="val" x="525" y="398" text-anchor="middle" fill="#e0533d">0</text></g>

  <!-- connector MINIO -> STATESTORE (read-back + verify) -->
  <g id="flow-conn-back"><path class="flow" d="M 800 242 L 800 300" stroke="#a78bfa"/></g>

  <!-- ================= STATE STORE ================= -->
  <rect class="box" x="700" y="300" width="200" height="120" stroke="#a78bfa55"/>
  <text class="title" x="800" y="324" text-anchor="middle" fill="#a78bfa">STATE STORE</text>
  <text x="800" y="346" text-anchor="middle" fill="#9aa0a6" font-size="11">SQLite · source offsets</text>
  <text class="cap" x="758" y="378" text-anchor="middle">kafka lag</text>
  <g id="flow-lag"><text class="val" x="758" y="402" text-anchor="middle" fill="#f2cc0c">0</text></g>
  <text class="cap" x="845" y="378" text-anchor="middle">in-flight</text>
  <g id="flow-inflight"><text class="val" x="845" y="402" text-anchor="middle" fill="#a78bfa">0</text></g>
</svg>
options.panelConfig:
---

# Flow panel config for the VTOP telemetry pipeline SVG.
# Cell ids in the SVG are authored directly as flow-*, so there is no draw.io
# "cell-" preamble to strip.
cellIdPreamble: ""
gradientMode: "hue"

anchorLinks:
  - flowAnimation: &flow
      thresholdOffValue: 1
      thresholdLwrValue: 100
      thresholdLwrDurationSecs: 1.5
      thresholdUprValue: 5000
      thresholdUprDurationSecs: 0.2

cells:
  # ---- SOURCES -> ENGINE ----
  flow-msgin:
    dataRef: "msgin"
    label: {separator: "space", units: "none", decimalPoints: 0}
  flow-bytesin:
    dataRef: "bytesin"
    label: {separator: "space", units: "none", decimalPoints: 0}
  flow-conn-in:
    dataRef: "bytesin"
    flowAnimation: *flow

  # ---- ENGINE ----
  flow-ratio:
    dataRef: "ratio"
    label: {separator: "space", units: "none", decimalPoints: 1}
  flow-p95:
    dataRef: "p95"
    label: {separator: "space", units: "s", decimalPoints: 3}
    labelColor:
      thresholds:
        - {color: "green",  level: 0}
        - {color: "orange", level: 0.05}
        - {color: "red",    level: 0.2}
  flow-recs:
    dataRef: "recs"
    label: {separator: "space", units: "none", decimalPoints: 0}

  # ---- ENGINE -> OBJECT STORAGE ----
  flow-bytesout:
    dataRef: "bytesout"
    label: {separator: "space", units: "none", decimalPoints: 0}
  flow-conn-out:
    dataRef: "bytesout"
    flowAnimation: *flow

  # ---- VERIFY / COMMIT (the invariant) ----
  flow-commits:
    dataRef: "commits"
    label: {separator: "space", units: "none", decimalPoints: 0}
  flow-failed:
    dataRef: "failed"
    label: {separator: "space", units: "none", decimalPoints: 0}
    labelColor:
      thresholds:
        - {color: "green", level: 0}
        - {color: "red",   level: 1}
  flow-verifybox:
    # box turns red the moment a batch fails, green while failed == 0
    dataRef: "failed"
    fillColor:
      thresholds:
        - {color: "#12331e", level: 0}
        - {color: "#3a1410", level: 1}
  flow-conn-verify:
    dataRef: "commits"
    flowAnimation: *flow

  # ---- READ-BACK + STATE STORE ----
  flow-conn-back:
    dataRef: "recs"
    flowAnimation: *flow
  flow-lag:
    dataRef: "lag"
    label: {separator: "space", units: "none", decimalPoints: 0}
    labelColor:
      thresholds:
        - {color: "green",  level: 0}
        - {color: "orange", level: 1000}
        - {color: "red",    level: 10000}
  flow-inflight:
    dataRef: "inflight"
    label: {separator: "space", units: "none", decimalPoints: 0}
